name: YAML Tools
description: 12 powerful YAML utilities in one place — format, validate, view, sort keys, flatten, diff, escape, and convert YAML to JSON, CSV, and more. All processing is 100% client-side; no data is ever sent to a server.
author: Shamrouz Awan
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='4' y1='6' x2='20' y2='6'/><line x1='4' y1='12' x2='14' y2='12'/><line x1='4' y1='18' x2='20' y2='18'/></svg>

meta.title: YAML Tools — 12 Free Online YAML Utilities
meta.description: Format, validate, view, sort, flatten, diff, and convert YAML data with 12 free browser-based tools. No sign-up required. YAML to JSON, CSV, and more.
